stemHtml: At a constant airspeed, a reduction in an aerofoil’s angle of attack results in the speed of the flow over the upper surface to...

options.a: decrease and the lifting ability of the aerofoil to decrease.
options.b: increase and the lifting ability of the aerofoil to increase.
options.c: decrease and the lifting ability of the aerofoil to increase.
options.d: increase and the lifting ability of the aerofoil to decrease.
